# update-github-pat-workflow-scope
Description: Update a GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) to include the 'workflow' scope, allowing it to manage GitHub Actions workflow files.
Source: project
1. Go to github.com and navigate to your user settings.
2. In the left sidebar, find and click on 'Developer settings'.
3. Under 'Developer settings', select 'Personal access tokens'.
4. Locate the Personal Access Token (PAT) that needs to be updated.
5. Click on the token to edit its settings.
6. In the list of scopes, find and check the box next to 'workflow'.
7. Scroll to the bottom of the page and click 'Update token' or 'Save changes' to apply the new scope.
